Desc_WAT1.description:
A strange alien thing with a mind-bending and somehow familiar shape.
WORK IN PROGRESS
ANALYZING THIS WILL NOT GIVE YOU ANYTHING

Desc_WAT2.description:
A Weird alien thing with an impossibly smooth surface.
WORK IN PROGRESS
ANALYZING THIS WILL NOT GIVE YOU ANYTHING

Desc_SAM.description:
Strange Alien Metal that glistens with new possibilities.
WORK IN PROGRESS
THIS IS NOT USED

Desc_IronRod.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

Desc_Wire.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

Desc_IronScrew.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

Descrystal.description: A strange slug radiating a weak strange power.

Descrystal_mk2.description: A strange slug radiating a strange power.

Descrystal_mk3.description: A strange slug radiating a powerful strange power.

DescrystalShard.description:
Mucus from the power slugs compressed into a solid crystal-like shard. 
It radiates a strange power.

Desc_Berry.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore one health segment.

Default__Desc_Berry.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore one health segment.

Desc_Shroom.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore two health segments.

Default__Desc_Shroom.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore two health segments.

Desc_Nut.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore half a health segment.

Default__Desc_Nut.description:
Slot: Hands
Consumable

Can be eaten to restore half a health segment.

Desc_RawQuartz.description: Raw Quartz can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.

Desc_QuartzCrystal.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Used in the production of advanced radar technology and high-quality display screens.

Desc_Gift.description:
Special FICSMAS buildings and parts can be obtained and produced from this FICSIT Holiday present.

*Watch the sky for deliveries from orbit!

DescandyCane.description:
A delicious Candy Cane to be enjoyed during the FICSMAS Holidays. 
*Disclaimer: Can't be consumed...

Desc_Snow.description: It's snow. Not the nice, thick, crunchy kind though... more the disgustingly wet, slushy kind... Guess we can make stuff from it.

Desc_XmasBow.description: A fancy Bow, maybe someone can wear this? You certainly can't! Probably, some parts and decorations can be made from this.

Desc_XmasBall3.description: Still used for making FICSMAS Decorations.

Desc_XmasBall4.description: This super special... nope... still just used for making FICSMAS Decorations.

Desc_XmasBranch.description: A special Tree Branch used to produce parts and buildings during the FICSMAS Event.

Desc_XmasBall2.description: Again, used for making FICSMAS Decorations.

Desc_XmasBallCluster.description: All the FICSMAS Ornaments smashed together to make even more FICSMAS Decorations!

Desc_XmasWreath.description: A decoration used to make decorations. Its use cases are questionable.

Desc_XmasStar.description: This special FICSMAS Star signifies the productivity of FICSIT all across the universe. It also signifies the fact that you have nearly completed the Holiday Event, so it's time to get back to work.

Descoal.description: Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & coal generators and for steel production.

Desc_ModularFrameFused.description: A corrosion resistant, nitride hardened, highly robust, yet lightweight modular frame.

Desc_QuantumOscillator.description: A superposition oscillator is an oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulation.

DescomputerQuantum.description: Uses quantum bits instead of normal bits which makes it much faster than a traditional computer.

Desc_Medkit.description:
Fully restores health when used.

The FICSIT Medicinal Inhaler can be produced from a variety of different ingredients.

Default__Desc_Medkit.description:
Fully restores health when used.

The FICSIT Medicinal Inhaler can be produced from a variety of different ingredients.

DescolorCartridge.description:
Used for applying Patterns to structures with the Customizer.

(Patterns can be purchased in the AWESOME Shop.)

Desc_ResourceSinkCoupon.description:
A special FICSIT bonus program Coupon, obtained through the AWESOME Sink.
Can be redeemed in the AWESOME Shop for bonus milestones and rewards.

Desc_HazmatFilter.description: Used in the Hazmat Suit to absorb radioactive particles.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorSnowballMittens.description:
Slot: Hands
Ammo: Snowball

*Disclaimer: Snowballs in pile not included in ammo reserve.

Desc_AluminumIngot.description:
Aluminum Ingots are made from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution.
Used to produce specialized aluminum-based parts.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorHazmatSuit.description:
Shields Pioneers from the adverse effects of radiation. 
Consumes Iodine Infused Filters from the inventory while worn in radioactive areas.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorRifle.description: A long-range, rapid-fire weapon. Specifically designed to deliver adequate performance within the designated work area.

Desc_RebarGunProjectile.description: Improvised ranged weapon for self-defense. Has to be reloaded after each use.

Desc_RebarGun.description: The Rebar Gun is an improvised weapon, used to protect yourself from dangerous wildlife.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorNobeliskDetonator.description: A remote-control device used to handle and detonate Nobelisks.

Desc_Fuel.description: Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for Vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_LiquidFuel.description: Fuel can be used to generate power or packaged to be used as fuel for Vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_Biofuel.description: The most energy-efficient form of solid biomass. Can be used as fuel for the Chainsaw.

Desc_PackagedBiofuel.description: Liquid Biofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for Vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_LiquidBiofuel.description: Liquid Biofuel can be used to generate power or packaged to be used as fuel for Vehicles.

Desc_Filter.description: Used in the Gas Mask to filter out toxins and pollutants from the air.

Desc_AlienProtein.description:
Ground down Alien Remains in a neat little package.
Used for medical purposes and to research alien organisms.

Desc_Battery.description: Primarily used as fuel for Drones and Vehicles.

Desc_AluminumPlate.description: Thin, lightweight, and highly durable sheets mainly used for products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength.

Descement.description:
Used for building.
Good for stable foundations.

Descable.description:
Used for crafting.
Primarily used to build power lines.

Desc_Stone.description:
Used for crafting.
Basic resource mainly used for stable foundations.

Desc_IronPlate.description:
Used for crafting.
One of the most basic parts.

Desc_FlowerPetals.description:
Used for crafting.
Colorful native flower petals.

Desc_Mycelia.description:
Used for crafting.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power.

Desc_Wood.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power.

Desc_Leaves.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power.

Desc_GenericBiomass.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass burners and vehicles can use it for power.
Biomass is much more energy-efficient than raw biological matter.

Desc_Fabric.description:
Used for equipment crafting.
Flexible but durable fabric.

Desc_Vines.description:
Primarily used as fuel.
Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power.

Desc_Pigment.description:
Used for crafting.
The color is brilliant and clear.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_1.description: Project Part #1. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_2.description: Project Part #2. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_3.description: Project Part #3. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_4.description: Project Part #4. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_5.description: Project Part #5. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_6.description:
Project Part #7. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce an easily expandable and powerful magnetic field.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_7.description:
Project Part #6. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

This extremely fast and precise computing system is specifically designed to direct the Project Assembly: Assembly Phase.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_8.description:
Project Part #8. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Uses extreme heat to produce the high-pressure plasma required to get Project Assembly into motion.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_9.description:
Project Part #9. Ship with the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.
Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).

Nuclear Pasta is extremely dense degenerate matter, formed when extreme pressure forces protons and electrons together into neutrons. It is theorized to exist naturally within the crust of neutron stars.

DescrystalOscillator.description: A crystal oscillator is an electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.

DescircuitBoard.description: Circuit Boards are advanced electronics that are used in a plethora of different ways.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorShockShank.description: Standard issue electroshock self-defense weapon for melee range.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorStunSpear.description: Heavy electroshock self-defense weapon for melee range.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorCandyCane.description:
Slot: Hands

Heavy delicious self defense weapon for melee range.

Deschainsaw.description:
Slot: Hands
Fuel: Biofuel

Used to clear an area of flora that is too difficult to remove by hand.

DescopperSheet.description:
Used for crafting.
Primarily used for pipelines due to its high corrosion resistance.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorBeacon.description:
PENDING REMOVAL
This item will (likely) be removed in a future update.

Currently only used as an ingredient in an alternative recipe.

Desc_Parachute.description: Slows down your fall when activated in mid-air.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorJumpingStilts.description:
An exoskeleton for the lower legs that assists movement, allowing Pioneers to sprint faster and jump higher.
Also dampens the impact of landing.

Desc_NuclearWaste.description:
The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in the Nuclear Power Plant.
Non-fissile Uranium can be extracted. Handle with caution.

Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

Desc_PlutoniumWaste.description:
The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in the Nuclear Power Plant.
Needs to be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution.

Caution: EXTREMELY Radioactive.

Desc_NuclearFuelRod.description:
Used as fuel for the Nuclear Power Plant.

Caution: Produces radioactive Uranium Waste when consumed.
Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Desc_IronPlateReinforced.description:
Used for crafting.
A sturdier and more durable Iron Plate.

Desc_BoomBox.description:
The Boombox is used to play the hottest music tapes on the planet.

Tapes are automatically added to the Boombox when obtained.

Desc_Sulfur.description: Sulfur is primarily used for Black Powder.

Desc_OreGold.description: Caterium Ore is smelted into Caterium Ingots. Caterium Ingots are mostly used for advanced electronics.

Desc_HogParts.description:
The carapace of the alien Hog creature.
Used for MAM research.

Desc_SpitterParts.description:
The remains of a plasma spitting alien creature.
Used for MAM research.

Desc_StingerParts.description:
The remains of whatever that creepy thing was.
Used for MAM research.

Desc_HatcherParts.description:
The shell-like remains of an alien... thing.
Used for MAM research.

Desc_OreIron.description:
Used for crafting.
The most essential basic resource.

Desc_OreCopper.description:
Used for crafting.
Basic resource mainly used for electricity.

DescopperIngot.description:
Used for crafting.
Crafted into the most basic parts.

Desc_IronIngot.description:
Used for crafting.
Crafted into the most basic parts.

Desc_Gunpowder.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce simple explosives.

Desc_GunpowderMK2.description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce modern firearms.

Desc_Plastic.description: A versatile and easy to manufacture material that can be used for a lot of things.

Desc_HeavyOilResidue.description: A by-product of Plastic and Rubber production. Can be further refined into Fuel and Petroleum Coke.

Desc_PackagedOilResidue.description: Heavy Oil Residue, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for Vehicles.

Desc_SteelPlateReinforced.description:
Encased Industrial Beams utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and tensile strength of steel simultaneously.
Mostly used as a stable basis for constructing buildings.

Desc_SteelPipe.description: Steel Pipes are used most often when constructing a little more advanced buildings.

Desc_SteelPlate.description: Steel Beams are used most often when constructing a little more advanced buildings.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorObjectScanner.description: Scans the area for a set item. Beeps at a rate proportional to proximity and direction.

Desc_Motor.description: The Motor creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.

Desc_Rubber.description: Rubber is a material that is very flexible and has a lot of friction.

DescircuitBoardHighSpeed.description: AI Limiters are super advanced electronics that are used to control AIs and keep them from evolving in malicious ways.

Desc_UraniumCell.description:
Uranium Cells are produced from Uranium Ore. 
Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production.

Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

Desc_TurboFuel.description: Turbofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for Vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_LiquidTurboFuel.description: A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used to generate power or packaged to be used as fuel for Vehicles.

Desc_AluminumCasing.description: A versatile container cast from Aluminum Ingots.

Desc_HardDrive.description: A hard drive with FICSIT data. Analyze it in the MAM to salvage its contents.

Desc_Rotor.description:
Used for crafting.
The moving parts of a motor.

Desc_AlienDNACapsule.description:
This data capsule translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetics information.
Used for researching alien organisms.

Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps. Depositing Alien DNA Capsules in the AWESOME Sink provides FICSIT with knowledge, and Pioneers with Coupons.

Desc_ModularFrame.description:
Used for crafting.
Multi-purpose building block.

DescompactedCoal.description: A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and coal generators.

Desc_FluidCanister.description: Used to package fluids for transportation.

Desc_PolymerResin.description:
Used for crafting.
A by-product of oil refinement into fuel. Commonly used to manufacture plastics.

Desc_LiquidOil.description: Crude Oil is refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.

Desc_PackagedOil.description: Crude Oil, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for Vehicles.

Desc_PetroleumCoke.description:
Used for crafting.
A carbon-rich material distilled from Heavy Oil Residue. 
Used as a less efficient coal replacement.

Desc_ElectromagneticControlRod.description: Control Rods regulate power output via electromagnetism.

Desc_PlutoniumFuelRod.description:
Used as fuel for the Nuclear Power Plant.

Caution: Produces radioactive Plutonium Waste when consumed.
Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

Desc_Silica.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, advanced refinement processes, and alternative production of electronics.

Desc_Stator.description:
Used for crafting.
The static parts of a motor.

Desc_HighSpeedWire.description: Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion makes it ideal for small, advanced electronics.

Desc_GoldIngot.description: Caterium Ingots are smelted from Caterium Ore. Caterium Ingots are mostly used for advanced electronics.

Desc_HighSpeedConnector.description: The high-speed connector connects several cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern so its applications are many and varied.

BP_EqDescZipLine.description:
Provides faster traversal in factories by allowing Pioneers to zip along Power lines.
Activate the Zipline and aim at a nearby Power Line to connect to it.

Desc_Zipline.description:
Provides faster traversal in factories by allowing Pioneers to zip along Power lines.
Activate the Zipline and aim at a nearby Power Line to connect to it.

Descomputer.description: A Computer is a complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in machines.

DescomputerSuper.description: The supercomputer is the next-gen version of the computer.

Desc_HUBParts.description: The parts required to build the basic structure of the HUB.

Desc_OreUranium.description:
Uranium is a radioactive element. 
Used to produce Encased Uranium Cells for Uranium Fuel Rods.

Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Desc_SteelIngot.description: Steel Ingots are made from Iron Ore that's been smelted with Coal. They are made into several parts used in building construction.

BP_ItemDescriptorPortableMiner.description: Can be set up on a resource node to automatically extract the resource. Note that it has limited storage space.

Desc_GolfCart.description:
The one and only FICSIT Factory Cart™
Now with special - FICSIT Foundation only - Grip Wheels, for an even smoother and faster factory floor experience!

Desc_GolfCartGold.description:
The one and only Golden FICSIT Factory Cart™

You have now officially ascended. 
Go forth now, Master of Spaghetti, God of the Factory, Sinker of Cups, Employee of the Planet... travel in STYLE!

BP_EquipmentDescriptorCupGold.description:
Slot: Hands

A shiny little cup, allowing extra hard-working Pioneers to enjoy a cup of well-deserved coffee while they wait for what the future will bring.

Desc_GasTank.description: Used to package gases and volatile liquids for transportation.

Desc_NitricAcid.description: Produced by reaction of Nitrogen Gas with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.

Desc_PackagedNitricAcid.description: Nitric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

DescopperDust.description:
Ground down Copper Ingots.
The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part fit for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

Desc_PressureConversionCube.description: Converts outgoing force into internal pressure. Required to contain unstable, high-energy matter.

Desc_PlutoniumCell.description:
Plutonium Cells are concrete encased Plutonium Pellets.
Used to produce Plutonium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production.

Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Desc_NonFissibleUranium.description:
The isotope Uranium-238 is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator.

Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

Desc_PlutoniumPellet.description:
Produced in the Particle Accelerator through conversion of Non-fissile Uranium.
Used to produce Encased Plutonium Cells for Plutonium Fuel Rods.

Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).
Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

DescoolingSystem.description: Used to keep temperatures of advanced parts and buildings from exceeding to inefficient levels.

Desc_MotorLightweight.description: The Turbo Motor is a more complex and more powerful version of the regular Motor.

Desc_SulfuricAcid.description: A mineral acid produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.

Desc_PackagedSulfuricAcid.description: Sulfuric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_AluminaSolution.description: Dissolved Alumina, extracted from Bauxite. Can be further refined into Aluminum Scrap for Aluminum Ingot production.

Desc_PackagedAlumina.description: Alumina Solution, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_PackagedNitrogenGas.description: Nitrogen Gas, packaged for alternative transport.

Desc_NitrogenGas.description: Nitrogen can be used in a variety of ways, such as metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On Massage-2(AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.

Desc_AluminumScrap.description: Aluminum Scrap is pure aluminum refined from Alumina. Can be smelted down to Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.

Desc_OreBauxite.description: Bauxite is used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorGasmask.description:
Allows Pioneers to breathe normally while in toxic gas areas.
Consumes Gas Filters from the inventory when in use.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorCup.description:
Slot: Hands

Standard issue Cup for melee range.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorHoverPack.description:
Power consumption: 100 MW

Allows for vertical movement and hovering in mid-air to improve building efficiency and factory traversal. Wirelessly connects to nearby power connections, such as Power Poles and Buildings, for power consumption.

Slow-fall: Hold {PlayerMovement_Jump} after losing connection mid-air.
Disable Hoverpack: Double tap {PlayerMovement_Crouch} while hovering.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorJetPack.description:
The Jetpack allows Pioneers to travel through the air with increased control.

Fuel is automatically consumed from the inventory to refill the Jetpack while on the ground.
Different fuel types can be used and provide different levels of Jetpack efficiency. The preferred fuel type will be used if available and can be set in the equipment inventory.

Desc_SpaceElevatorBlocker.description: You can't progress past this point in Early Access

Desc_QuantumCrystal.description: Quantum Crystals are crystals manipulated to store data in quantum bits. Can store an incredible amount of data.

Desc_UraniumPellet.description:
Produced in the Refinery, Uranium Pellets are purified and cast from Uranium Ore. 
Primarily used to make Uranium Cells.

Caution: Moderately radioactive.

BP_EquipmentDescriptorMachinegun.description: A deadly machine gun made for one thing - effective disposal of irritating wildlife.

Desc_SAMFluctuator.description: Special part used to build the Converter.
